item.dc:creator: CziltangBrony

item.title: Please vote for these kinds of programs if you see them in your area
item.description:
The fact only 17% of people said it increased their income enough to afford a properly balanced diet is fantastically depressing and heartbreaking in itself, and goes to show just how bad the situation really is for a lot of us.. Struggling just to "earn a living" - slaving at a minimum-wage job just to *earn* the right to eat and sleep somewhere warm. Capitalism failed, it's time for some radical changes, and the old guard needs to GTFO the way of X and millennials that are ready to start changing things with an eye toward the future.
I am amazed that this happened in Texas, the capital Austin, even.. This is RADICAL socialism as far as Texas is concerned. Special sauce; https://www.businessinsider.com/austin-guarunteed-basic-income-gbi-ubi-housing-security-homeless-2024-1 #UBI #universalbasicincome
item.dc:creator: Sensixx

item.title: Painting with notes
item.description: 1725: it’s been a long day at the workshop. The air is hot in Venice and you decide to go to your favorite gelato at the grand palazzo. There’s a crowd gathered and abuzz with excitement. The musicians on stage start playing and you hear this music for the first time in your life. Vivaldi’s Four Seasons. The mundane worries of your daily life melt away. You have the time of your life as you realize how much power music has to transform the soul. Now where’s that gelato ??
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.dc:creator: jrpsmith

item.title: Kiya Was Here
item.description: I thank you all for the kind words and I'm glad her life can be remembered on such a scale as this. I'm sorry for making some of you cry. I hope none of this comes off like I'm seeking out pity or attention. My only intention is to share her story with anyone who may enjoy knowing she was in this world and made it better.
item.dc:creator: juggernaut1

item.title: The stele of Thonis-Heracleion being raised from the sea where it had been for over a thousand years, one of the greatest submerged discoveries ever in ancient Egypt. It was created by Pharaoh Nectanebo I

item.title: Imagine shaming people for this
item.description: US Army battalion shaming a troop for going to sick call, publicly, to their parent. I have been active duty for over a decade and shit like this infuriates me. If it infuriates you as well, feel free to torch them as they are legally unable to turn off comments https://www.facebook.com/beastcompany1en?mibextid=ZbWKwL

item.title: A post to make your day a bit better
item.description: I hope this post made your day a bit better. The Imgur community has helped me in the past few days when I was in need, I figured it was the least I could do. Thanks again to anyone who helped on my post https://imgur.com/gallery/GrSUtyO . I can't put into words how much the support meant to me, how much the food was needed
item.dc:creator: TheEntirePopulationofTexas
